user.description: Please select your inverter brand and configure how often data is saved to the database.
user.title: Inverter Brand Selection

data_description.install_kind: Choose 'Reconnecting an existing system' if you previously ran Monitor My Solar on this Home Assistant and want your existing history kept. Choose 'Fresh install' for cleaner entity names without the dongle ID.

setup_type.description: Choose the type of setup for your {brand} inverter(s).
setup_type.title: Setup Type Selection

parallel.description: Configure your {brand} parallel setup with the master dongle and up to 5 slave inverters.
parallel.title: Parallel Inverter Configuration

single_gridboss.description: Configure your {brand} single GridBoss setup with the GridBoss dongle and up to 3 slave inverters.
single_gridboss.title: Single GridBoss Configuration

dual_gridboss.description: Configure your {brand} dual GridBoss setup with two GridBoss dongles, each with up to 3 slave inverters.
dual_gridboss.title: Dual GridBoss Configuration

gridboss.description: Select which dongle is connected to your GridBoss unit.
gridboss.title: GridBoss Configuration

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the MQTT server. Please check your settings.

data.update_interval: Intervalo de Actualización de Base de Datos

user.description: Por favor, ingrese la siguiente información para configurar su inversor.
user.title: Configuración de Inverter MQTT

parallel.description: Ingrese los IDs de dongle adicionales para sus inversores en paralelo.
parallel.title: Configuración de Múltiples Inversores

gridboss.description: Seleccione qué dongle está conectado a su unidad GridBoss.
gridboss.title: Configuración de GridBoss

error.cannot_connect: No se puede conectar al servidor MQTT. Por favor, revise sus configuraciones.

restore_entities.title: Restore Entities
restore_entities.description: {count} entity(ies) can be restored. These were deleted or disabled and won't come back on a normal reload. Select the ones to bring back — they'll be recreated from the catalog.

abort.no_restorable_entities: There are no deleted or disabled entities to restore.

error.raw_ids_taken: Another Monitor My Solar entry already uses the clean (no dongle ID) entity names. Only one entry can use them - keep the dongle ID in entity names for this one.
